case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA VS. YUANFA XU et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST; & WAIVER OF ATTYS'. FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA
DECLARATION OF ELIZABETH NEU RE: CCP 585(A) - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XU, YUANFA $10,909.21 PRINCIPAL, $1,359.92 INTEREST, $356.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,625.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA SERVED FEB-04-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT XU, YUANFA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $356.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT XU, YUANFA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA AS TO DEFENDANT XU, YUANFA DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2009
